use_cases: Displaying image portfolios in an interactive circular gallery layout
Showcasing products with flip-reveal card animations
Creating engaging team member or testimonial displays
Building visual-heavy landing pages with interactive card elements
Designing photo galleries with hover-activated content reveal
ai_summary: A circular flip card gallery component that arranges cards in a circular pattern with hover-triggered flip animations revealing title and description content. Features a minimalist design with clean borders and smooth transitions, optimized for showcasing visual content like photos, products, or portfolio items with engaging interactive effects.
